title: Capital at deficiency, Bara Jaya divests 3 subsidiaries
body: PT Pacific Prima Coal (PPC), shareholder of PT Bara Jaya Internasional Tbk (ATPK), has taken over the entire assets of three of ATPK’s subsidiaries following the approval secured last week (25/6).

title: Maintaining 70% shares in JAI, KFC to strengthen broiler supply
body: PT Fast Food Indonesia Tbk (FAST), the managing company of KFC fast food chain, retains 70% ownership in PT Jagonya Ayam Indonesia (JAI).

title: TJT secured IDR 55 billion loan for Ciawi-Sukabumi Toll maintenance
body: PT Trans Jabar Tol (TJT) has obtained a loan facility worth IDR 55 billion from PT Waskita Toll Road (WTR), a subsidiary of PT Waskita Karya (Persero) Tbk (WSKT).

title: Spindo to prepare for cash dividend distribution of IDR 105.98 billion
body: PT Steel Pipe Industry of Indonesia Tbk (ISSP), also known as Spindo, will distribute cash dividend of IDR 105.98 billion or IDR 15 per share from its 2023 net profit.

title: Tommy Soeharto’s golf company sets IPO price to IDR 200 per share
body: PT Intra Golflink Resorts Tbk (GOLF), a golf course consultancy and management company of Tommy Soeharto, has decided the initial public offering (IPO) price of IDR 200 per share.
